characters.description: An Earth-born Unbound altered into a Nemean. Banished into the void after surviving the essence-anchor crisis, he receives a quest to escape and carries Ravenous Tithe, an ability that consumes claimed targets and their power.
characters.name: Felix Nevarre

characters.description: Felix's bonded Tenku companion, stranded beside him in the void. Pit fights at Felix's side as they search for a way to escape.
characters.name: Pit

characters.description: A weakened primordial bound to Felix through power he consumed. The Maw cannot strike him physically in the void, but remains a hostile and knowledgeable adviser who seeks influence over him.
characters.name: The Maw

characters.description: A powerful corrupted void creature carrying much of the Maw's stolen power. The Maw's reaction draws it toward Felix Nevarre and Pit, and it begins pursuing them.
characters.name: The Corrupted Gnarhollow

characters.description: A dwarf pirate officer who commands a schooner's attack after its crew notices Felix and Pit in the void.
characters.name: The dwarf pirate officer

characters.description: A dwarf officer who commands a pirate schooner's attack on Felix and Pit. He belongs to the Ten Hands and captains the Night's Wake.
characters.name: The Night's Wake captain

characters.description: The heir of Pax Rell, a guild trainee, and a survivor of Magda's Foglands expedition. At the tribunal, she credits Magda's group with rescuing abandoned prisoners and challenges the guild's refusal to help them.
characters.name: Vessilia Dayne

characters.description: The missing leader of the Foglands rescue expedition. Her actions saved prisoners abandoned by the guild, while her surviving associates face judgment in her absence.
characters.name: Magda Aren

characters.description: A member of the group caught in the tribunal's aftermath. She remains with the Foglands survivors while Magda Aren and Felix Nevarre are missing.
characters.name: Evie Aren

characters.description: Magda's former teammate and one of the Foglands survivors facing the guild tribunal. He belongs to the group left to manage the consequences while Magda and Felix remain missing.
characters.name: Harn Kastos

characters.description: The Harwatch guild's Elder of Acquisitions. During the tribunal, she defends the guild's decision not to mount a rescue after its Foglands operation lost contact.
characters.name: Eliza DuFont

characters.description: Vessilia Dayne’s guardian, who removes her from the guild tribunal after she challenges the council.
characters.name: Vessilia Dayne’s guardian

characters.description: The Nixie ruler of the Ten Hands stronghold and Felix's captor. He offers Felix a place among the pirates after the Night's Wake brings the unusual newcomer before him.
characters.name: The Ten Hands captain

characters.description: A naiad cook in the Ten Hands stronghold. She recognizes Pit as a Tenku and gives him mana-rich food, showing him respect uncommon among Felix's captors.
characters.name: Dahlia

characters.description: An ogre enforcer serving the Ten Hands captain. He is identified as a dangerous journeyman-level member of the pirate leadership.
characters.name: Korm Rocksplitter

characters.description: A disturbed human and former Sage of Vellus living in the void. His fragmented knowledge points Felix toward a temple near desolation as a possible route of escape.
characters.name: Daedalus Mungle

characters.description: A fire mage and Foglands survivor studying under a Harwatch elder. His association with the expedition draws the attention of hostile noble apprentices.
characters.name: Atar V'as

characters.description: The leader of the Harwatch guild branch. He views the changed Foglands as an opening for territorial growth and access to newly available resources.
characters.name: High Elder Fairbanks

characters.description: A Harwatch guild elder directing research into inert primordial essence found in Foglands survivors. The elder proposes extracting and studying it through a concealed program.
characters.name: Elder of Spirit

characters.description: A Sworn agent employed by Eliza DuFont. The assignment combines Vessilia Dayne's protection with the intended killing of Magda Aren.
characters.name: The Sworn operative

characters.description: A Ten Hands scout who secretly follows Felix with a silent elf companion under concealment wards. The pair report on Felix's strength and handling of his damaged ship.
characters.name: The half-orc pirate bard

characters.description: A silent elf who trails Felix Nevarre alongside a half-orc scout. Concealment wards hide the pair while they observe Felix for the Ten Hands captain.
characters.name: The silent elf observer

characters.description: A corva rim worker who brings Felix and Pit to Echo's Reach. Impressed by Felix's restraint and his voluntary pact with Pit, he offers to house both newcomers.
characters.name: The corva ferryman

characters.description: The ferryman who shelters Felix and Pit at his three-island farm in Echo's Reach. He maintains the household with his spouse and children.
characters.name: The corva farmer

characters.description: A corva farmkeeper and parent who shares a three-island farm with the ferryman. She welcomes Felix and Pit into the family household.
characters.name: The corva farmkeeper

characters.description: Vessilia Dayne's former betrothed and current combat instructor, acting for her father. The Hand confines her interests to her family's plans and presses her to abandon her Foglands allies.
characters.name: The duke's Hand

characters.description: A guild archivist who lets Vessilia Dayne overhear news of the hidden Foglands survivors by manipulating a privacy ward, then restores the ward while watching how she responds.
characters.name: The guild archivist

characters.description: An Echo's Reach leader who intervenes when conference guards provoke Felix, disciplines them, and receives Felix and Pit privately.
characters.name: The conference lord

characters.description: The Master Inquisitor commanding the Inquisition contingent that arrives in Harwatch. He announces an operation against Foglands monsters and demonstrates authority backed by overwhelming mana.
characters.name: Corrin Catan

characters.description: Vessilia Dayne’s guardian. He restricts her contact with guild members he has not approved.
characters.name: Darius

characters.description: A concealed survivor who watches Magda's body being removed from the guild ward. Hidden by illusion and aided by inherited arrays, he evades the group while pursuing a plan associated with his father.
characters.name: The unidentified envoy

characters.description: A living dwarf imprisoned within a pirate ship's mana engine and drained as its power source. The vessel cannot be operated normally while the captive remains connected.
characters.name: The imprisoned dwarf

characters.description: An Echo's Reach conference leader rescued by Felix from a pirate mana engine. He survives the extraction but is left nearly unresponsive by his captivity.
characters.name: Lord Knowledge
